objectives: Software Engineer with 2.5+ years of experience building responsive web and mobile applications using React.js and React Native with strong interest and hands-on experience in Web3/Blockchain integration. Proficient in modern JavaScript/TypeScript frameworks, UI development and API integration. Comfortable collaborating with backend systems and deploying full-stack solutions.
mobile-applications-development-descript: Developed cross-platform mobile applications with a keen focus on crafting intuitive UI, flawless UX, adaptive, responsive designs and seamless integration with backend services.
websites-development-description: Building high-performance, user friendly websites with professional interfaces using cutting edge technologies for efficient and scalable web applications.
blockchain-description: Focused on creating secure, efficient blockchain products that fully leverage Smart Contracts and decentralized networks.
backend-development-description: Focused on building high performance backend systems that handle heavy traffic, ensuring scalability and easy maintainability.
education-school: Software Engineering | Cao Thang Technical College
